children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is hereby imposed on the amount paid for taxable transportation of any person a tax equal to 7.5 percent of the amount so paid.

children.heading: Domestic segments of taxable transportation
children.label: b Domestic segments of taxable transportation

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is hereby imposed on the amount paid for each domestic segment of taxable transportation by air a tax in the amount of $3.00.

children.heading: Domestic segment
children.label: 2 Domestic segment
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “domestic segment” means any segment consisting of 1 takeoff and 1 landing and which is taxable transportation described in section 4262(a)(1).

children.heading: Changes in segments by reason of rerouting
children.label: 3 Changes in segments by reason of rerouting
A
children.text: transportation is purchased between 2 locations on specified flights, and

children.label: B
children.text: there is a change in the route taken between such 2 locations which changes the number of domestic segments, but there is no change in the amount charged for such transportation,

children.heading: Use of international travel facilities
children.label: c Use of international travel facilities

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is hereby imposed a tax of $12.00 on any amount paid (whether within or without the United States) for any transportation of any person by air, if such transportation begins or ends in the United States.

children.heading: Exception for transportation entirely taxable under subsection (a)
children.label: 2 Exception for transportation entirely taxable under subsection (a)
children.text: This subsection shall not apply to any transportation all of which is taxable under subsection (a) (determined without regard to sections 4281 and 4282).

children.heading: Special rule for Alaska and Hawaii
children.label: 3 Special rule for Alaska and Hawaii
children.text: In any case in which the tax imposed by paragraph (1) applies to a domestic segment beginning or ending in Alaska or Hawaii, such tax shall apply only to departures and shall be at the rate of $6.

children.heading: By whom paid
children.label: d By whom paid
children.text: Except as provided in section 4263(a), the taxes imposed by this section shall be paid by the person making the payment subject to the tax.

children.heading: Segments to and from rural airports
children.label: 1 Segments to and from rural airports

children.heading: Exception from segment tax
children.label: A Exception from segment tax
children.text: The tax imposed by subsection (b)(1) shall not apply to any domestic segment beginning or ending at an airport which is a rural airport for the calendar year in which such segment begins or ends (as the case may be).

children.label: i
children.text: there were fewer than 100,000 commercial passengers departing by air (in the case of any airport described in clause (ii)(III), on flight segments of at least 100 miles) during the second preceding calendar year from such airport, and

children.label: I
children.text: is not located within 75 miles of another airport which is not described in clause (i),

children.label: II
children.text: is receiving essential air service subsidies as of the date of the enactment of this paragraph, or

children.label: III
children.text: is not connected by paved roads to another airport.

children.heading: Amounts paid outside the United States
children.label: 2 Amounts paid outside the United States
children.text: In the case of amounts paid outside the United States for taxable transportation, the taxes imposed by subsections (a) and (b) shall apply only if such transportation begins and ends in the United States.

children.heading: Amounts paid for right to award free or reduced rate air transportation
children.label: 3 Amounts paid for right to award free or reduced rate air transportation

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any amount paid (and the value of any other benefit provided) to an air carrier (or any related person) for the right to provide mileage awards for (or other reductions in the cost of) any transportation of persons by air shall be treated for purposes of subsection (a) as an amount paid for taxable transportation, and such amount shall be taxable under subsection (a) without regard to any other provision of this subchapter.

children.heading: Controlled group
children.label: B Controlled group
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), a corporation and all wholly owned subsidiaries of such corporation shall be treated as 1 corporation.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: C Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe rules which reallocate items of income, deduction, credit, exclusion, or other allowance to the extent necessary to prevent the avoidance of tax imposed by reason of this paragraph. The Secretary may prescribe rules which exclude from the tax imposed by subsection (a) amounts attributable to mileage awards which are used other than for transportation of persons by air.

children.heading: Inflation adjustment of dollar rates of tax
children.label: 4 Inflation adjustment of dollar rates of tax
i
children.text: such dollar amount, multiplied by

children.label: ii
children.text: the cost-of-living adjustment determined under section 1(f)(3) for such calendar year by substituting the year before the last nonindexed year for “calendar year 2016” in subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof.

children.label: i
children.text: 2002 in the case of the $3.00 amount contained in subsection (b), and

children.label: ii
children.text: 1998 in the case of the dollar amounts contained in subsection (c).

children.heading: Taxable event
children.label: C Taxable event
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), in the case of the tax imposed by subsection (b), the beginning of the domestic segment shall be treated as the taxable event.

children.heading: Special rule for amounts paid for domestic segments beginning after 2002
children.label: D Special rule for amounts paid for domestic segments beginning after 2002
children.text: If an amount is paid during a calendar year for a domestic segment beginning in a later calendar year, then the rate of tax under subsection (b) on such amount shall be the rate in effect for the calendar year in which such amount is paid.

children.heading: Amounts paid for aircraft management services
children.label: 5 Amounts paid for aircraft management services
i
children.text: maintenance and support of the aircraft owner’s aircraft, or

children.label: ii
children.text: flights on the aircraft owner’s aircraft.

children.label: i
children.text: assisting an aircraft owner with administrative and support services, such as scheduling, flight planning, and weather forecasting,

children.label: ii
children.text: obtaining insurance,

children.label: iii
children.text: maintenance, storage and fueling of aircraft,

children.label: iv
children.text: hiring, training, and provision of pilots and crew,

children.label: v
children.text: establishing and complying with safety standards, and

children.label: vi
children.text: such other services as are necessary to support flights operated by an aircraft owner.

children.heading: Lessee treated as aircraft owner
children.label: C Lessee treated as aircraft owner

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “aircraft owner” includes a person who leases the aircraft other than under a disqualified lease.

children.heading: Disqualified lease
children.label: ii Disqualified lease
children.text: For purposes of clause (i), the term “disqualified lease” means a lease from a person providing aircraft management services with respect to such aircraft (or a related person (within the meaning of section 465(b)(3)(C)) to the person providing such services), if such lease is for a term of 31 days or less.

children.heading: Pro rata allocation
children.label: D Pro rata allocation
children.text: In the case of amounts paid to any person which (but for this subsection) are subject to the tax imposed by subsection (a), a portion of which consists of amounts described in subparagraph (A), this paragraph shall apply on a pro rata basis only to the portion which consists of amounts described in such subparagraph.
by helicopter for the purpose of transporting individuals, equipment, or supplies in the exploration for, or the development or removal of, hard minerals, oil, or gas, or
by helicopter or by fixed-wing aircraft for the purpose of the planting, cultivation, cutting, or transportation of, or caring for, trees (including logging operations),

children.heading: Exemption for air ambulances providing certain emergency medical transportation
children.label: g Exemption for air ambulances providing certain emergency medical transportation

children.text: by helicopter, or
by a fixed-wing aircraft equipped for and exclusively dedicated on that flight to acute care emergency medical services.

children.heading: Exemption for skydiving uses
children.label: h Exemption for skydiving uses
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this section or section 4271 on any air transportation exclusively for the purpose of skydiving.

children.heading: Exemption for seaplanes
children.label: i Exemption for seaplanes
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this section or section 4271 on any air transportation by a seaplane with respect to any segment consisting of a takeoff from, and a landing on, water, but only if the places at which such takeoff and landing occur have not received and are not receiving financial assistance from the Airport and Airways Trust Fund.

children.heading: Exemption for aircraft in fractional ownership aircraft programs
children.label: j Exemption for aircraft in fractional ownership aircraft programs
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this section or section 4271 on any air transportation if tax is imposed under section 4043 with respect to the fuel used in such transportation. This subsection shall not apply after .September 30, 2028

children.label: i
children.text: beginning on the 7th day after the date of the enactment of the Airport and Airway Trust Fund Tax Reinstatement Act of 1997, and

children.label: ii
children.text: ending on , andSeptember 30, 2028

children.label: B
children.text: amounts paid during such period for transportation beginning after such period.

children.heading: Refunds
children.label: 2 Refunds
children.text: If, as of the date any transportation begins, the taxes imposed by this section would not have applied to such transportation if paid for on such date, any tax paid under paragraph (1)(B) with respect to such transportation shall be treated as an overpayment.
